c.d: Maximum size of a single file or batch of files that can be sent using the app in its free or standard version
Security mechanisms in place, such as end-to-end encryption, password protection, or encryption protocols used during file transfer
Availability and interoperability of the app on multiple operating systems like iOS, Android, Windows, macOS
User-friendliness measured by UI simplicity, required setup time, and ease of operation without registration
Extra functionalities like link expiration, branding customization, integrated chat, or file preview capabilities
